title: Extracting Event Dates
scenario: Write a prompt to extract the dates associated with an event from a given sentence. For example, the sentence could be 'The conference will take place on January 15, 2024, at the city hall.' The target artifact should be the extracted date 'January 15, 2024'.
constraints: Must use natural language processing (NLP) techniques

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt uses recognized NLP techniques such as entity recognition or part-of-speech tagging.
Check if the prompt is under 50 words and uses NLP techniques.
